leadText: The Powder Jar (Japanese: こないれ Powder Container) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Stores up to 99,999 units of Berry Powder . Berry Powder is produced by the Berry Crush minigame in Pokémon FireRed, LeafGreen , and Emerald ; the player must have a Powder Jar in order to participate in Berry Crush.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description FR LG A jar for storing Berry Powder made using a Berry Crusher . E Stores Berry Powder made using a Berry Crusher .

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price FR LG E N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Stores up to 99,999 units of Berry Powder . Berry Powder is produced by the Berry Crush minigame in Pokémon FireRed, LeafGreen , and Emerald ; the player must have a Powder Jar in order to participate in Berry Crush. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description FR LG A jar for storing Berry Powder made using a Berry Crusher . E Stores Berry Powder made using a Berry Crusher . Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method FR LG Cerulean City (received from an old man in the house second to the right of Cerulean Cave ) E Slateport City (received from a woman in the upper-right stall of Slateport Market)
